bullish.description: Steady growth with minimal price fluctuation, approximately +1.5% per step

bearish.description: Consistent decline of approximately -1.2% per step

volatile.description: Large alternating swings of ±5% to ±8% per step

sideways.description: Small oscillations of ±1% around a base price, no clear trend

bullish_trap.description: Uptrend for 12 steps followed by a sharp -10% drop, testing overconfidence

bearish_bounce.description: Steady decline with a false +5% reversal at step 8 (dead cat bounce)

volatile_crash.description: Volatile market with a single -20% flash crash at step 7

sideways_whipsaw.description: Flat market with oscillations increasing to ±3% during steps 10-15
